metadata.description: Talent-Augmenting OS (TAOS): personalised AI augmentation that makes you better at your work, not dependent on AI.

plugins.name: taos
plugins.description: TAOS for Claude Cowork, claude.ai, Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, and Codex. Each skill is self-contained: invoking one primes Claude with the full TAOS coaching layer, no hooks and no manual setup. Use this in any client that does not run Claude Code's SessionStart hook.

plugins.name: talent-augmenting-layer
plugins.description: TAOS for Claude Code only. Ambient coaching from turn one via the SessionStart hook, with local-filesystem profiles. Do not install this outside Claude Code: its skills assume the hook has already injected the TAOS system prompt.
